hero.description: My name is Vlad — web developer, passionate about creating beautiful and responsive websites.

skills.title: Skills
list: Able to read and write HTML5 and CSS3
Know how to implement responsive design and work with frameworks
Able to build web projects using both Desktop-first and Mobile-first approaches
Have experience with JavaScript and front-end frameworks
Understand how to optimize web performance
Know how to ensure cross-browser compatibility
Have experience working with RESTful APIs and asynchronous data fetching

projects.title: My projects
projects.text: Real-world projects demonstrating my skills in architecture, UI, and data handling.
